transcript: Speaker A: ಇನ್ಮೇಲಿಂದ ಈ ಪದಗಳನ್ನ ಬಳಸಬೇಡಿ. 'I am fine, thank you', 'I don't know', 'You are welcome'. ಇದು ತುಂಬಾ basic English. ನಾನು ಕೂಡ ಮೊದಲು ಹೀಗೆ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಮಾತಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದೆ. ನಂತರ MySivi ನಲ್ಲಿ practice ಸ್ಟಾರ್ಟ್ ಮಾಡ್ದೆ. [From now on, don't use these words. 'I am fine, thank you', 'I don't know', 'You are welcome'. This is very basic English. I also used to speak English like this before. Then I started practicing on MySivi.] Speaker B: Hello, what is your name? Speaker A: Uh, my name is Neha. Speaker B: How old are you? Speaker A: I have 22. Speaker B: 'I have 22' ಅಲ್ಲ, 'I am 22 years old' ಅಂತ ಹೇಳ್ಬೇಕು. ['I have 22' is wrong, you should say 'I am 22 years old'.] Speaker A: Okay okay, I am 22 years old. Speaker B: Where are you from? Speaker A: I am Karnataka. Speaker B: 'I am Karnataka' ಅಲ್ಲ, 'I am from Karnataka' ಅಂತ ಹೇಳ್ಬೇಕು. ['I am Karnataka' is wrong, you should say 'I am from Karnataka'.] Speaker A: Oh, okay okay. ನನಗೆ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಚೆನ್ನಾಗಿ ಬರೋದಿಲ್ಲ. [Oh, okay okay. I don't know English very well.] Speaker B: ಏನು ಪ್ರಾಬ್ಲಮ್ ಇಲ್ಲ. AI Teacher ಟ್ರೈ ಮಾಡಿದ್ದೀಯಾ? [No problem. Have you tried AI Teacher?] Speaker A: ಅದು ತುಂಬಾ costly ಇರುತ್ತೆ ಅಲ್ವಾ? [That must be very costly, right?] Speaker B: ಅಯ್ಯೋ ಇಲ್ಲ, ನಾರ್ಮಲ್ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕ್ಲಾಸಸ್ ಗಿಂತ 7x cheaper ಇದೆ. ಅದಕ್ಕೆ 1 ಕೋಟಿ ಜನ MySivi ನಲ್ಲಿ ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದಾರೆ. [Oh no, it is 7x cheaper than normal English classes. That's why 1 crore people are practicing on MySivi.] Speaker A: ಆದ್ರೆ ಟೈಮ್ ಸಿಗಲ್ಲ? [But what if I don't get time?] Speaker B: ದಿನಕ್ಕೆ ಜಸ್ಟ್ 15-20 mins ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಸಾಕು. ನೀನು ಫುಲ್ ಕಾನ್ಫಿಡೆಂಟ್ ಆಗ್ತೀಯಾ. [Just 15-20 mins of practice a day is enough. You will become fully confident.] Speaker A: Wow! ಹೇಗೆ ಜಾಯಿನ್ ಆಗೋದು? [Wow! How to join?] Speaker B: ಈ install ಬಟನ್ ಕ್ಲಿಕ್ ಮಾಡಿ MySivi ಆಪ್ ಡೌನ್ಲೋಡ್ ಮಾಡಿ. ಜಸ್ಟ್ 15 ಡೇಸ್ ನಲ್ಲಿ ಇಂಪ್ರೂವ್ಮೆಂಟ್ ಕಾಣಿಸೋಕೆ ಸ್ಟಾರ್ಟ್ ಆಗುತ್ತೆ. ಬಾ, ಸ್ಟಾರ್ಟ್ ಮಾಡೋಣ. [Click this install button and download the MySivi app. You will start seeing improvement in just 15 days. Come, let's start.] Speaker C: Click on Install Now and download MySivi app.
on_screen_text: ಇನ್ಮೇಲಿಂದ ಈ ಪದಗಳನ್ನ ಬಳಸಬೇಡಿ [Don't use these words from now on] I am fine, thank you, I don't know, You are welcome, ಇದು ತುಂಬಾ BASIC ENGLISH... [This is very basic English...], MySivi, WHAT IS YOUR NAME?, HOW OLD ARE YOU?, I HAVE 22, I AM 22 YEARS OLD, WHERE ARE YOU FROM?, I AM KARNATAKA, I AM FROM KARNATAKA, Arya AI Teacher, 7x Cheaper, 1 CRORES+ PEOPLE, 15-20 MINTS, INSTALL, 15 DAYS, MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: A Kannada presenter demonstrates how she improved her English using the MySivi app. She interacts with an AI robot avatar that corrects her grammatical mistakes in real-time. The ad highlights that the app is 7x cheaper than traditional classes and prompts users to install it.
